منصة إتقان التعليمية — جميع الحقوق محفوظة
تقرير الأسبوع: ${summary.recitations_count} تلاوة، ${summary.sessions_attended} جلسة حضرها، ${summary.badges_earned} شارة جديدة

SELECT
         CONCAT('جلسة تسميع مع ', COALESCE(u.name, 'مقرئ')) AS title,
         b.scheduled_at,
         b.status,
         u.name AS counterpart_name,
         (b.student_joined_at IS NOT NULL OR b.status = 'completed') AS attended,
         (b.status = 'confirmed' AND b.scheduled_at > NOW()) AS upcoming
       FROM bookings b
       LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = b.reader_id
       WHERE b.student_id = $1
         AND b.scheduled_at >= $2 AND b.scheduled_at <= $3
       ORDER BY b.scheduled_at DESC

SELECT cs.title,
            COALESCE(c.title, 'جلسة مباشرة') AS course_title,
            COALESCE(sa.joined_at, cs.scheduled_at) AS attended_at
       FROM session_attendance sa
       JOIN course_sessions cs ON cs.id = sa.session_id
       LEFT JOIN courses c ON c.id = cs.course_id
      WHERE sa.student_id = $1
        AND COALESCE(sa.joined_at, cs.scheduled_at)::date BETWEEN $2::date AND $3::date
        AND COALESCE(sa.attendance_status, 'present') IN ('present', 'attended')
      ORDER BY attended_at DESC
